scripts.build: pnpm --filter @infiwallet/types build && pnpm --filter @infiwallet/validation build && pnpm --filter @infiwallet/utils build && pnpm -r --filter "./services/*" build && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/*" build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm run db:migrate:user && pnpm run db:migrate:wallet && pnpm run db:migrate:kyc
scripts.db:push: pnpm run db:push:user && pnpm run db:push:wallet && pnpm run db:push:kyc
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter @infiwallet/user-service run db:seed && pnpm --filter @infiwallet/kyc-service run db:seed
scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter @infiwallet/user-service exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @infiwallet/wallet-service exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @infiwallet/kyc-service exec prisma generate
